SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement

Class JkRepo

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement.JkRepo
public final class JkRepo extends Object
Hold configuration necessary to instantiate download or upload repository

    • ivyConfig

      public final JkRepo.JkRepoIvyConfig ivyConfig
      Configuration specific to Ivy repository. Returns null if this configuration stands for a Maven repository.

    • publishConfig

      public final JkRepo.JkPublishConfig publishConfig
      Configuration specific for repository for which, we want to publish on.

    • ivyRepo

      public final boolean ivyRepo

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static JkRepo of(String url)
      Creates a repository having the specified url. If the repository is an Ivy repository than the url should start with ivy: as ivy:http://myrepolocation. If specified url is "local" then it returns the local repository.

    • of

      public static JkRepo of(Path dir)
      Creates a Maven repository having the specified file location.

    • ofMavenCentral

      public static JkRepo ofMavenCentral()
      Creates the Maven central repository. If the github token is present in environment variable GITHUB_TOKEN, the credential is set up using this token .

    • ofGitHub

      public static JkRepo ofGitHub(String owner, String repoName)

    • ofMavenOssrhDownloadAndDeploySnapshot

      public static JkRepo ofMavenOssrhDownloadAndDeploySnapshot(String jiraId, String jiraPassword)
      Creates an OSSRH repository for both deploying snapshot and download artifacts.

    • ofMavenOssrhDeployRelease

      public static JkRepo ofMavenOssrhDeployRelease(String jiraId, String jiraPassword, JkFileSigner signer)
      Creates an OSSRH repository for deploying released artifacts.

    • ofMavenOssrhPublicDownload

      public static JkRepo ofMavenOssrhPublicDownload()
      Creates a OSSRH repository for downloading both snapshot and released artifacts.

    • ofLocal

      public static JkRepo ofLocal()
      Creates a Maven repository for publishing locally under [USER HOME]/.jeka/publish folder.

    • ofLocalIvy

      public static JkRepo ofLocalIvy()
      Creates an Ivy repository for publishing locally under [USER HOME]/.jeka/publish folder.

    • toReadonly

      public JkRepo toReadonly()
      Returns a new JkRepo instance with the same configuration as the current one, but without any publication configuration, effectively making it read-only.
      Returns:
      a new JkRepo instance configured as read-only

    • isReadonly

      public boolean isReadonly()
      Returns if this repository is in read-only mode. A repository is considered read-only if it does not have a publishing configuration.

    • getUrl

      public URL getUrl()
      Returns the url of this repository.

    • getIvyConfig

      public JkRepo.JkRepoIvyConfig getIvyConfig()

    • isIvyRepo

    • isLocal

      public boolean isLocal()

    • getCredentials

      public JkRepo.JkRepoCredentials getCredentials()
      Retrieves the credentials associated with this repository.
      Returns:
      the credentials configured for this repository, or null if no credentials are set

    • setCredentials

      public JkRepo setCredentials(JkRepo.JkRepoCredentials credentials)
      Sets credentials to access to this repo.

    • toSet

      public JkRepoSet toSet()

    • hasAuthorizationHeader

      public boolean hasAuthorizationHeader()

    • findVersionsOf

      public List<String> findVersionsOf(String moduleId)
      Retrieves the list of available versions for a given module identifier. This method fetches and parses the associated Maven metadata to extract the versions. If the repository responds with client or server errors, an empty list is returned.
      Parameters:
      moduleId - a string representing the module identifier in the format group:name
      Returns:
      a list of strings representing the available versions of the specified module in lastest first order
